refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level; decomposing it into sub-functions allows targeted design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time components (load, travel, dump) individually and in aggregate under representative duty cycles to verify meeting p95 ≤ CT_target.

selected_dp.selected_dp: Automated load handling system; Optimized travel path planning; Efficient dump mechanism

potential_sources: Load handling affects travel start time
coupling_check.notes: Sub-functions are logically separable with manageable coupling; modular design can isolate concerns.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate cycle time measurement and control
Risk that travel optimization depends on real-time site conditions
Risk that automation complexity may impact safety
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating real-time telemetry feedback to adapt travel and load handling dynamically.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for cycle time optimization including load, travel, and dump operations

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Provides real-time data on vehicle status and cycle progress for optimization

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands and cycle targets from higher-level control

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as it encapsulates all cycle time optimization functions; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module implements physical load, travel, dump but interfaces with NGHE Solution for control.
Supports remote control but less direct responsibility for cycle time optimization.
Focuses on safety alerts, minimal direct role in cycle time.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization logic in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves control coherence.
containment_risks: Potential complexity overload in NGHE Solution module
Interface coordination with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules must be robust
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate splitting NGHE Solution into submodules if complexity grows; ensure clear interface contracts.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement logically decomposes the high-level cycle time KPI into manageable sub-functions with clear DP candidates.

diffusion_risks: Risk of overloading NGHE Solution module with multiple tightly coupled DPs
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as primary IM; diffusion risk manageable with good interface design.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and cycle time measurements at the NGHE Solution module level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization to NGHE Solution module with interfaces to Vehicle and Teleoperation.

recommended_revisions: Monitor complexity in NGHE Solution IM and consider submodule decomposition if needed.
Strengthen interface definitions between NGHE Solution and Vehicle modules.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignment meets the criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility with manageable risks.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Cycle time can be decomposed into load, travel, and dump components
Telemetry and tasking interfaces provide sufficient data and control
NGHE Solution module can handle integrated optimization logic
open_risks: Complexity management in NGHE Solution module
Safety integration with cycle time optimization
evidence_needed: Cycle time measurement data under representative duty cycles
Safety impact analysis of automation features
